briefs.title: Development Charge Instalment Elections Made Before Jan 1, 2026 Grandfathered Under Old Rules
briefs.summary: BC amended the Development Charge (Instalments) Regulation so that developers who elected instalment payments and paid the first instalment before Jan 1, 2026 remain governed by the pre-2026 payment rules, not the new ones.
briefs.action_required: Confirm whether your development charge instalment election and first payment were made before January 1, 2026 to determine which rules apply.

key_dates.label: BC Development Charge (Instalments) Regulation amendment takes effect
